rationale: The cited paper is directly aligned with the citing paper’s stated prior-work positioning: the 2012 study says it extends Wal-Mart entry research that focused on incumbent retailers, and the 2008 paper is exactly a Wal-Mart entry–incumbent impact study. There is also construct-level overlap (e.g., assortment overlap as a moderator) between the notes, suggesting a plausible mechanism/theory source rather than an incidental mention.
